Class ExcelFile

java.lang.Object
java.io.File
io.github.sentinel.files.TestFile
io.github.sentinel.files.ExcelFile
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<File>
public class ExcelFile extends TestFile
Provides read access to Excel (.xlsx) files for use in Sentinel test scenarios. Mirrors the structure and API of CsvFile so that step definitions and test patterns are consistent between CSV and Excel handling.

Data is loaded into memory on construction as a List<List<String>>. Row indexing is 1-based and excludes header rows, matching the CSV convention. Column indexing is also 1-based.

Only the first worksheet is loaded by default; use the ExcelFile(Path, int, int) constructor to specify a different sheet.

See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • ExcelFile

      public ExcelFile() throws FileNotFoundException
      Creates an ExcelFile from the most recently downloaded file with 1 header row.
      Throws:
      FileNotFoundException - if no file has been downloaded in this test session.

    • ExcelFile

      public ExcelFile(Path pathToFile) throws FileNotFoundException
      Creates an ExcelFile from the specified path with 1 header row.
      Parameters:
      pathToFile - path to the .xlsx file
      Throws:
      FileNotFoundException - if the file does not exist at the given path

    • ExcelFile

      public ExcelFile(int numberOfHeaderRows) throws FileNotFoundException
      Creates an ExcelFile from the most recently downloaded file.
      Parameters:
      numberOfHeaderRows - number of header rows at the top of the sheet
      Throws:
      FileNotFoundException - if no file has been downloaded in this test session

    • ExcelFile

      public ExcelFile(Path pathToFile, int numberOfHeaderRows) throws FileNotFoundException
      Creates an ExcelFile from the specified path. This is the primary constructor.
      Parameters:
      pathToFile - path to the .xlsx file
      numberOfHeaderRows - number of header rows at the top of the sheet
      Throws:
      FileNotFoundException - if the file does not exist at the given path

    • ExcelFile

      public ExcelFile(Path pathToFile, int numberOfHeaderRows, int sheetIndex) throws FileNotFoundException
      Creates an ExcelFile from the specified path and sheet index.
      Parameters:
      pathToFile - path to the .xlsx file
      numberOfHeaderRows - number of header rows at the top of the sheet
      sheetIndex - zero-based index of the worksheet to load
      Throws:
      FileNotFoundException - if the file does not exist at the given path

  • Method Details

    • loadExcelFile

      private void loadExcelFile()

    • readAllFileContents

      public List<List<String>> readAllFileContents()
      Reads all rows from the configured worksheet into memory as strings. Formula cells are evaluated before conversion.
      Returns:
      every row (including header rows) as a list of string values

    • cellToString

      private String cellToString(org.apache.poi.ss.usermodel.Cell cell, org.apache.poi.ss.usermodel.FormulaEvaluator evaluator)

    • formatNumericValue

      private String formatNumericValue(org.apache.poi.ss.usermodel.Cell cell, double value)

    • getNumberOfTotalRows

      public int getNumberOfTotalRows()
      Returns the total number of rows including header rows.
      Returns:
      total row count

    • getNumberOfDataRows

      public int getNumberOfDataRows()
      Returns the number of data rows (total rows minus header rows).
      Returns:
      data row count

    • readHeaders

      public List<String> readHeaders()
      Returns the last header row as a list of column name strings.
      Returns:
      header values
      Throws:
      IndexOutOfBoundsException - if the file has no header rows

    • getColumnIndex

      public int getColumnIndex(String columnHeader)
      Returns the 1-based column index for the given header name.
      Parameters:
      columnHeader - the column header text to find
      Returns:
      1-based column index, or 0 if the header is not found

    • readRowData

      public List<String> readRowData(int rowIndex)
      Returns a single row of data values. Row 1 is the first data row after headers.
      Parameters:
      rowIndex - 1-based row index (excludes header rows)
      Returns:
      list of cell values for that row

    • readCellData

      public String readCellData(int columnIndex, int rowIndex)
      Returns the value of a cell by 1-based column and row index.
      Parameters:
      columnIndex - 1-based column index
      rowIndex - 1-based data row index (excludes header rows)
      Returns:
      cell value as a String

    • readCellData

      public String readCellData(String columnHeader, int rowIndex)
      Returns the value of a cell by column header name and 1-based row index.
      Parameters:
      columnHeader - column header text
      rowIndex - 1-based data row index (excludes header rows)
      Returns:
      cell value as a String

    • readAllCellDataForColumn

      public List<String> readAllCellDataForColumn(int columnIndex)
      Returns all data cell values in a column by 1-based index.
      Parameters:
      columnIndex - 1-based column index
      Returns:
      list of cell values (excludes header rows)

    • readAllCellDataForColumn

      public List<String> readAllCellDataForColumn(String columnHeader)
      Returns all data cell values in a column by header name.
      Parameters:
      columnHeader - column header text
      Returns:
      list of cell values (excludes header rows)

    • verifyColumnHeaderEquals

      public boolean verifyColumnHeaderEquals(String columnHeader, boolean partialMatch)
      Verifies that a column header exists in the header row.
      Parameters:
      columnHeader - the header name to find
      partialMatch - if true, checks whether any header contains the value; if false, checks for an exact match
      Returns:
      true if the header is found, false otherwise

    • verifyCellDataContains

      public String verifyCellDataContains(int rowIndex, int columnIndex, String textToMatch, boolean partialMatch)
      Verifies that a cell contains the expected text. Returns null on success (assertion passed) or the actual cell value on failure, consistent with the CSV convention.
      Parameters:
      rowIndex - 1-based data row index
      columnIndex - 1-based column index
      textToMatch - text to check for
      partialMatch - if true, uses contains; if false, uses exact match
      Returns:
      null if assertion passes, the actual cell value if it fails

    • verifyCellDataContains

      public String verifyCellDataContains(int rowIndex, String columnHeader, String textToMatch, boolean partialMatch)
      Verifies that a cell contains the expected text, looking up the column by name.
      Parameters:
      rowIndex - 1-based data row index
      columnHeader - column header text
      textToMatch - text to check for
      partialMatch - if true, uses contains; if false, uses exact match
      Returns:
      null if assertion passes, the actual cell value if it fails

    • verifyAllColumnCellsContain

      public boolean verifyAllColumnCellsContain(int columnIndex, String textToMatch, boolean partialMatch)
      Verifies that all data cells in a column match the expected text.
      Parameters:
      columnIndex - 1-based column index
      textToMatch - text to check for
      partialMatch - if true, uses contains; if false, uses exact match
      Returns:
      true if all cells match, false otherwise

    • verifyAllColumnCellsContain

      public boolean verifyAllColumnCellsContain(String columnHeader, String textToMatch, boolean partialMatch)
      Verifies that all data cells in a column match the expected text, looking up the column by name.
      Parameters:
      columnHeader - column header text
      textToMatch - text to check for
      partialMatch - if true, uses contains; if false, uses exact match
      Returns:
      true if all cells match, false otherwise

    • verifyAnyColumnCellContains

      public boolean verifyAnyColumnCellContains(int columnIndex, String textToMatch, boolean partialMatch)
      Verifies that at least one data cell in a column matches the expected text.
      Parameters:
      columnIndex - 1-based column index
      textToMatch - text to check for
      partialMatch - if true, uses contains; if false, uses exact match
      Returns:
      true if any cell matches, false otherwise

    • verifyAnyColumnCellContains

      public boolean verifyAnyColumnCellContains(String columnHeader, String textToMatch, boolean partialMatch)
      Verifies that at least one data cell in a column matches the expected text, looking up the column by name.
      Parameters:
      columnHeader - column header text
      textToMatch - text to check for
      partialMatch - if true, uses contains; if false, uses exact match
      Returns:
      true if any cell matches, false otherwise
